arts.ttl: Barcelona president confirms contract talks with 3 key players
arts.sum: Speaking during his opening speech at FC Barcelona's Ordinary General Assembly, club president Laporta confirmed talks are ongoing between Barca and all three players' representatives, revealing: “We are working on Araujo, De Jong and Pedri’s new contracts.” Barcelona president Joan Laporta has confirmed that the club are in talks with Ronald Araujo, Pedri and Frenkie de Jong over new contracts.

arts.ttl: Barcelona leading Real Madrid in race for free agent defender
arts.sum: Barcelona are ahead of arch rivals Real Madrid in the race for Bayer Leverkusen star Jonathan Tah. That’s according to Relevo transfer insider Matteo Moretto, who has on Saturday provided…

arts.ttl: Barcelona possible starting lineup against Sevilla in LaLiga
arts.sum: Hansi Flick has confirmed that Gavi, Dani Olmo, and Fermin will be fit for the match . The German coach also confirmed that Iñaki Peña will remain the starting goalkeeper, though he expressed optimism about Szczesny’s return to fitness.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich lose Aleksandar Pavlović for Barcelona clash due to collarbone break
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlović will be missing for Bayern Munich’s must-watch UEFA Champions League tie with Barcelona due to a collarbone break suffered against VfB Stuttgart. The German international suffered a broken collarbone in the Bundesliga match against VfB Stuttgart on Saturday evening.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich midfielder suffers injury ahead of Barcelona clash

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Sevilla injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Barcelona and Sevilla.
